privileged_info_summary: The task operates on the real San Francisco UrbanSim dataset (sanfran_public.h5). All explicit metadata constraints regarding output file paths, required JSON keys, required CSV columns, and the 50-household minimum zone filtering are verified to be strictly enforced by the task instructions and verifier.py logic. However, an independent audit of the downloaded real HDF5 dataset found that the task is fundamentally defective. The prompt instructs the agent to analyze a "workers" column inside the "households" table, and setup_task.sh explicitly enforces "assert 'workers' in hh.columns". This assertion will perpetually fail during task initialization because the real "households" table lacks a "workers" column (it contains only "building_id", "building_type_id", "income", "persons", and "tenure").
